visual: Horse stance with both hands tracing mirrored spiraling circles in front of the torso, driven by continuous waist rotation.
motion_description: Maintaining a wide-legged squat with subtle side-to-side weight shifts, the torso performs a continuous, gentle rotation of about 15 to 30 degrees. The hands trace large, mirrored outward circles at a slow, steady tempo, starting at the lower abdomen, sweeping out to the sides, and rising above shoulder height. At the peak of the arc, the palms turn inward as the hands draw together in front of the face, then press smoothly down the body's vertical center line.
